full_text:
The tumor piece was quite small. I cut it and dissociated it using Collagenase/Hyaluronidase (#07912 StemCell technologies, aliquoted 12.03.2020 NC). For 10 ml of enzymatic dissociation medium, I used 8,9 ml of AdF+++ medium (i.e. DMEM/F12 medium (supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and pen/step), 1 ml C&H (10x to 1x), and 100 ul DNAse (RNase free). Incubated in +37C for 2 hours rotating; RBC lysis buffer 2 mL + 10 mL of AdF+++ medium. After centrifuge, cells were resuspended in 2 mL of the medium and counted.

Cell counts:

Cell count/ml 1):

total: 1,99 E6

live: 0.567 E6

viability: 28.5 %

size: 9.1 um

Cell count /ml 2):

total: 1.06 E6

live: 4.68 E6

viability: 44.4 %

size: 12.6 um

Average cell count/ml:

1.525 E6 cells/ml

Total cell count: 6.1 E6 cells

(1.525 E6 cells/ml x 4 ml)

Total volume: 4 mL

Overall # of cells in 4 mL was 6.1 E6

11 aliquots with 0.5 E6 cells per tube were aliquoted for FACS staining. The rest was discarded.

FACS staining with fibroblast flow cytometry panel

For staining cells were aliquoted into 11 tubes:

2x multicolor samples

unstained sample

FMO samples:

DCM FMO

CD45 FMO

EpCAM FMO

a-SMA FMO

CD29 FMO

CD31 FMO

PDGFR-b FMO

FAP FMO

Surface staining:

Added FACS buffer and centrifuged 400 g +4 C 6 min.

Made an antibody mix for the multicolor samples; 50µl per tube, diluted in Brilliant Stain buffer. For FMO samples, added the needed amount Brilliant Stain buffer (see table below) to the cells and then added antibodies one by one to the tubes (containing the cells). For FMO samples, added every other antibody except the corresponding one.

45 min incubation for multicolor samples and 30 min for FMO samples. Washed and incubated for 40 min with Fixation buffer (#00-8222 Invitrogen) and added 1x permeabilization (10x perm (Invitrogen) buffer diluted in mQH2O) for 5 min. Centrifuged and washed once with FACs buffer before storing the samples overnight at +4C.

Intracellular staining (next day, 11.7.2024)

Centrifuged the cells 400 g 6min +4C and prepared the intracellular antibody mix:

12,5 µl APC a-SMA in 487.5 µl 1 x Permeabilization buffer.

Resuspended the pellet in 50 µl of intracellular antibody mix and incubated 30 min +4C shielded from light.

After incubation, washed the cells with 1 x Permeabilization buffer, centrifuged 400 g 6 min +4C, and resuspended the pellet in 350 µl FACS buffer. Pipeted the cell suspension through Falcon 5 ml polystyrene tube with a cell-strainer cap (blue).

Samples were kept on ice and protected from light until running at Fortessa.

Compensation beads:

Added 1 drop of both positive (BD CompBeads AntiMouse IgG, #51-90-9001229) and negative (CompBeads Negative Control #51-90-9001291) compensation beads to Falcon 5ml polystyrene round bottom tubes (white cap). To each compensation tube labeled for a single fluorochrome-conjugated antibody, added 1 ul of the corresponding antibody (see FC panel above for the antibodies, except DCM-BV510 was replaced with CD16-BV510). Compensation tubes were incubated approx. 1 hour 45min at +4 shielded from light before adding 350 ul FACS buffer. 30 min incubation is enough but FACS buffer was added just before running the compensations at Fortessa.
